_readme: This file is the ONLY thing you should need to edit to keep the central bank
calendar current. It is intentionally plain JSON (no code) so it can be
the decision announcement time converted to UTC), 'note' }.
'country' uses the same currency-code convention as the Forex Factory source
(AUD, CAD, EUR, JPY, GBP, USD) so the two sources merge cleanly.
HOW TO UPDATE: each central bank publishes its next year's meeting schedule
roughly 6-12 months ahead, usually between August and December for the
following year. Check back a couple of times a year and add new entries.
Official sources are listed per bank below -- always prefer the bank's own
STATUS NOTE: RBA and BoJ entries below are INCOMPLETE / UNVERIFIED for the
remainder of 2026 -- see the 'placeholder' fields. Fill these in from the
official links before relying on them.

UNCONFIRMED - BoC's December 2026 date was not yet published as of last verification. Check source URL above.
UNVERIFIED - RBA publishes its Monetary Policy Board meeting calendar at the source URL above. Fill in remaining 2026 dates from there.
UNVERIFIED - BoJ publishes its Monetary Policy Meeting schedule at the source URL above (updated weekly). Fill in remaining 2026 dates from there.
